title: Martin Shkreli Responds to Being Called a Sociopath
summary: A brief clip where Martin Shkreli responds to accusations of being a sociopath, arguing that extreme rationalism is often confused for sociopathy and defending healthcare pricing by citing insatiable demand for healthcare.

acronyms.definition: The total monetary value of all goods and services produced within a country's borders

key_claims.claim: Healthcare's percentage of GDP has grown metronomically since 1960
Demand for healthcare is insatiable and healthcare is the only good with infinite marginal utility
